summary: Comprehensive testing of Four Seasons Sales Dashboard completed. All 5 blocks visible and functional. Backend APIs (14 tests) passed 100%. Frontend UI and interactions working correctly including both modals, Pay Period filter, Settings dialog, and Update button.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (/api/) - 200 OK
Backend API /api/dashboard/kpis - Returns all required KPI fields
Backend API pay_period filter - Correctly filters data by Feb 05-18, 2026
Backend API Commission Payment section fields present
Backend API Under Book Price (price_margin) fields present
Backend API SPIFF breakdown with brand data structure
Backend API follow_ups array with required fields
Backend API sales records for table
Backend API charts data (unit_type_count, status_distribution, monthly_data)
Backend API date filters (week, 2weeks, month, year, all)
Backend API Excel config get/set endpoints
Backend API pay-periods list endpoint
Backend API dashboard refresh endpoint
Frontend - Dashboard loads with all 5 blocks visible
Frontend - Pay Period defaults to current period (Feb 05, 2026 - Feb 18, 2026)
Frontend - Executive Summary shows 6 KPIs: Total Revenue, Commission, Closed Deals, Closing Rate, Leads, Avg Ticket
Frontend - Commission Payment section shows Installations, Revenue, Commission, SPIFF Included
Frontend - Under Book Price section shows Sales at 5%, Revenue, Commission
Frontend - SPIFF Breakdown shows Total SPIFF and brand cards
Frontend - Sales Analysis has Unit Type pie chart and Revenue by Unit Type bar chart
Frontend - Performance Trends has Deal Status bar chart and Monthly Revenue area chart
Frontend - Sales This Period table shows 4 records with Name, City, Unit, Value, Commission, Install Date
Frontend - Clicking sale row opens sale detail modal with commission breakdown
Frontend - Pending Follow-Ups table shows 6 records with priority, name, city, follow-up date, days
Frontend - Clicking follow-up row opens client detail modal
Frontend - Pay Period filter change refreshes data correctly
Frontend - Settings gear opens dialog to change Google Sheet URL
Frontend - Update button refreshes data with loading state

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 blocks, modals, filters, and settings working

seed_data_creation: None - uses live Google Sheet data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Backend uses FastAPI with Google Sheets as data source. Frontend React app with 5-block layout: Executive Summary, Commission Payment/Under Book Price/SPIFF Breakdown, Sales Analysis/Performance Trends, Sales This Period table, Pending Follow-Ups. Pay Period filter defaults to current bi-weekly period. Both sale and follow-up row clicks open detail modals.

screenshots.dashboard_initial: Shows header, Pay Period filter (Feb 05-18, 2026), Executive Summary 6 KPIs, Commission Payment section
screenshots.dashboard_charts: Shows SPIFF Distribution pie chart, Sales Analysis charts, Performance Trends charts
screenshots.dashboard_sales_table: Shows Sales This Period table with 4 records
screenshots.dashboard_followups: Shows Pending Follow-Ups with 6 URGENT items
screenshots.sale_modal: Sale detail modal with commission breakdown (Base + SPIFF)
screenshots.client_modal: Client detail modal with location, dates, equipment quoted
screenshots.pay_period_changed: Dashboard after changing to Jan 22 - Feb 04 period
screenshots.settings_dialog: Settings dialog with Google Sheet URL input
